title: Moccacino
description: Just your average fps boosting modpack☕
body: Introducing Moccacino: This modpack aims to improve your enjoyment of Minecraft by increasing FPS  and enhancing visual appeal. It incorporates high-quality shaders and texture packs for a spectacular visual improvement along with a carefully chosen selection of performance optimisation tweaks to speed up the game's performance on less powerful PCs. The ultimate balancing act between functionality and aesthetics is achieved by Moccacino, allowing players to experience the game's enhanced graphics without compromising its usability.
